barRaise.topFinding: The renderer and state model stay healthy and the canonical audit ran clean again (docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-06-15.md: "No drift"), so for the eighth consecutive daily review there is zero finding in application code. The recurring perimeter is draining, not growing: the dashboard-drift MEDIUM from 06-14 closed once the dashboard writer landed in the v0.18.3/v0.18.4 script releases (herb metric corrected 0 to 199, audit pointer advanced), and the .git repo repacked from 1020 MB to 864 MB. What remains is three decision-shaped items no fix will close: the still-large .git history, the work-queue split across three project-ID spellings, and a 98%-complete tool burning daily lens passes plus public version-pill bumps on script-only releases. The highest-leverage move is unchanged: cut v1.0, make the .git call, and drop Apothecary to weekly review.
